name: raycall
title: Raycall
description: Semantic bookmark search - save any URL and find it later in natural language.
author: rithmic

commands.name: save-url
commands.title: Save URL
commands.description: Save a URL to Raycall. Pre-fills from the active browser tab or clipboard.

commands.name: search-bookmarks
commands.title: Search Bookmarks
commands.description: Search your saved bookmarks in natural language.
